title: Clean View
description: A clean view leads to clean plays
body:
# CleanView - The Ultimate Visual Clarity Mod

---

## 🎯 Tired of Particles Blocking Your Vision?

**CleanView** gives you complete control over Minecraft's visual clutter. Whether you're in intense PvP combat, making PvP videos, or just want a cleaner gameplay experience, CleanView has you covered.
---

## ✨ Features

### ⚔️ Held Item Scaling
- **Mainhand Scale** — Resize items in your main hand (0x - 2x)
  - Change the position and rotation of the items
- **Offhand Scale** — Resize items in your off hand (0x - 2x)
  - Change the position and rotation of the items
- Perfect for smaller weapon models during combat or larger tools for visibility

### ✨ Particle Control
- **Particle Scale** — Scale ALL particles in the game (0x - 2x)
- **Status Effect Particles** — Control potion swirl visibility (0% - 100%)
- Reduce visual noise while maintaining essential feedback

###  ![Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89d8ddeb032970e7655f7084261a0b0ad850fbec.png)  Totem Effects
- **Totem Pop Scale** — Adjust totem of undying particle size (0x - 2x)
- **Totem Particle Scale** — Adjust the size of Totem Particles seperately (0x - 2x)
- Essential for PvP — clear vision immediately after popping

### 🍪 Eating Effects
- **Eating Crumbs Scale** — Control food crumb particle size (0x - 2x)
- Reduce clutter while eating without losing all feedback

---

## 🎨 Beautiful Configuration Screen

![Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0194884cc3843a3b5f93dc54a5c0f60f7ff64f79_0.webp)

CleanView features a stunning custom configuration screen built with **Yet Another Config Lib (YACL)**:

- 🎯 **Intuitive sliders** for precise control
- 🌙 **Dark theme** that matches Minecraft's aesthetic
- 📁 **Organized categories**: Held Items, Particles, Totem Effects, Eating
- 💾 **Auto-save** — your settings persist between sessions

---

## 📥 Installation

1. **Install Fabric Loader** (0.15.11+) — [Get Fabric](https://fabricmc.net)
2. **Install Fabric API** — [Get Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. **Install Mod Menu** — [Get Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
5. **Download CleanView** — [Get CleanView](https://modrinth.com/mod/cleanview)
6. **Drop into mods folder** — Launch and enjoy! 🎉
